message:
refactor(test): use spawnJfp testing utility for CLI tests

Rewrites skills.test.ts to use the core testing utilities:

- Uses spawnJfp from @jeffreysprompts/core/testing
- Removes manual console/process mocking
- Cleaner async test structure
- Proper process isolation via subprocess spawning
- Configurable timeout support

This approach provides better test isolation and more realistic CLI
testing by actually spawning the CLI process rather than mocking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
